title: Begin Stacklight Removal by Disconnecting the M12 Connector
summary: This source-specific maintenance runbook captures the documented initial stacklight replacement removal activity from the OptiSweep Operation and Maintenance Manual. The source supports required PPE, required replacement part and tool context, an estimated duration, and one explicit removal instruction: disconnect the M12 connector from the stacklight.
when_to_use: Use this runbook when beginning the documented stacklight replacement removal procedure and the task to be performed is the initial source-supported action of disconnecting the M12 connector from the stacklight.
not_for: Do not use this runbook as a complete stacklight replacement procedure.
Do not use this runbook for reinstallation, restoration, or any additional removal steps not present in the supplied source excerpt.
Do not use this runbook when additional maintenance controls are required but are not specified in this source excerpt.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the documented stacklight identification, connector location, and M12 disconnection steps using the listed PPE and tool context.

safety_notes: The supplied source excerpt is incomplete and supports only the initial removal action.
Stop and escalate if additional removal, replacement, or restoration steps are needed but are not present in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to the stacklight and its M12 connector

access_required: Physical access to the M12 connector on the stacklight
system_preconditions: Task is being performed in the context of stacklight replacement removal.

visual_references.description: Photo of the stacklight referenced in the Stacklight Replacement procedure.

steps.title: Gather documented replacement items and PPE
steps.purpose: Prepare the documented items and PPE before beginning the source-supported removal action.
steps.instruction: Gather the documented items for stacklight replacement: replacement three-segment stacklight, safety glasses, gloves, and a 7-mm wrench.
steps.expected_result: The documented replacement part, PPE, and tool are available for the task.
steps.healthy_condition: Replacement three-segment stacklight, safety glasses, gloves, and 7-mm wrench are present and ready for use.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented items are missing or unavailable.

actions.label: Verify required items
actions.exact_action: Gather the documented items for stacklight replacement: replacement three-segment stacklight, safety glasses, gloves, and a 7-mm wrench.

stop_or_escalate_if: The replacement three-segment stacklight is not available.
